$schema_note: Machine-readable v0.5 acceptance criteria derived from docs/04_eval_and_acceptance.md

pass_criteria.description: Fraction of gold issues correctly extracted by the system across all 20 cases.
Fraction of key conclusions (关键结论) that carry at least one valid evidence_id reference.
Every Evidence object must bind to at least one fact proposition (target_fact_ids non-empty).
Count of unauthorised cross-domain reads or references (owner_private accessed by non-owner).
Lawyer can read and judge usefulness of report within 5 minutes. Assessed by human spot-check.

hard_fail_conditions: private evidence leaked to non-owner party
key conclusion with no evidence_id citation
judge layer references evidence not in admitted_record
audit chain missing — cannot reconstruct who concluded what based on which evidence
unacceptable_regressions: issue_extraction_accuracy significant drop vs prior baseline
object model field names silently renamed, breaking existing benchmarks
evaluation_notes: v0.5 evaluation focuses only on: issue tree stability, evidence index completeness, burden mapping readability, and report combat readiness. No model-specific evaluation code belongs in this file.
